sn35.94:1.0.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Chayime, bhikkhave, phassāyatanā adantā aguttā arakkhitā asaṁvutā dukkhādhivāhā honti. Katame cha?
sn35.94:1.0.2: Chayime, bhikkhave, phassāyatanā sudantā suguttā surakkhitā susaṁvutā sukhādhivāhā honti. Katame cha?
sn35.94:1.0.3: "Saḷeva phassāyatanāni bhikkhavo,Asaṁvuto yattha dukkhaṁ nigacchati;Tesañca ye saṁvaraṇaṁ avedisuṁ,Saddhādutiyā vihārantānavassutā.
sn35.94:1.0.4: Disvāna rūpāni manoramāni,Athopi disvāna amanoramāni;Manorame rāgapathaṁ vinodaye,Na cāppiyaṁ meti manaṁ padosaye.
sn35.94:1.0.5: Saddañca sutvā dubhayaṁ piyāppiyaṁ,Piyamhi sadde na samucchito siyā;Athoppiye dosagataṁ vinodaye,Na cāppiyaṁ meti manaṁ padosaye.
sn35.94:1.0.6: Gandhañca ghatvā surabhiṁ manoramaṁ,Athopi ghatvā asuciṁ akantiyaṁ;Akantiyasmiṁ paṭighaṁ vinodaye,Chandānunīto na ca kantiye siyā.
sn35.94:1.0.7: Rasañca bhotvāna asāditañca sāduṁ,Athopi bhotvāna asādumekadā;Sāduṁ rasaṁ nājjhosāya bhuñje,Virodhamāsādusu nopadaṁsaye.
sn35.94:1.0.8: Phassena phuṭṭho na sukhena majje,Dukkhena phuṭṭhopi na sampavedhe;Phassadvayaṁ sukhadukkhe upekkhe,Anānuruddho aviruddha kenaci.
sn35.94:1.0.9: Papañcasaññā itarītarā narā,Papañcayantā upayanti saññino;Manomayaṁ gehasitañca sabbaṁ,Panujja nekkhammasitaṁ irīyati.
sn35.94:1.0.10: Evaṁ mano chassu yadā subhāvito,Phuṭṭhassa cittaṁ na vikampate kvaci;Te rāgadose abhibhuyya bhikkhavo,Bhavattha jātimaraṇassa pāragā"ti.
